description: Calling a derivative or mip-biased texture op inside non-uniform branching, where the result is undefined across the SIMD group.
body: Failure mode: a shader calls dFdx/dFdy or samples with an implicit LOD inside an if-branch that not all invocations in a group take, but derivatives need neighboring lanes active, so the result is undefined and varies by GPU. Detection signals: speckled or block-shaped artifacts along edges; output differs across drivers; the validation layer warns about derivatives in non-uniform control flow. Do not place derivative or implicit-LOD operations inside divergent branches. Safer fallback: hoist derivative and implicit-LOD texture operations into uniform control flow, or compute the LOD explicitly and pass it to textureLod, then confirm a clean validation pass and consistent output across drivers.
